metadata.description: MEV censorship-resistance canary contract for SentinelMesh. Burns compute units via iterative hashing and mutates on-chain state to detect transaction reordering and censorship by block builders.

instructions.name: processInstruction
docs: Performs `hash_iterations` sequential SHA-256 hashes and writes the result plus a timestamp to the target account.
Used to detect MEV reordering and transaction censorship across Solana RPC endpoints.

accounts.name: targetAccount
docs: PDA derived from the payer's pubkey. Must be owned by this program and have >= 40 bytes of data.

args.name: hashIterations
docs: Number of sequential SHA-256 hashes to perform, simulating DeFi routing compute load.
